news.title: Uplifting greatness at the Celebration of Excellence
news.summary_en: Students, staff, and faculty gathered together this week to celebrate the year’s accomplishments and recognize the outstanding work happening across the school at the annual Celebration of Excellence.

news.title: Students receive future educator award
news.summary_en: The Indiana Association of Colleges for Teacher Education’s Outstanding Future Educator Award recognizes academic excellence and significant professional promise, demonstrated during the student teaching experience.
